column1: Hi, my name is Omar. I want to rent a 2 bedroom apartment in Dubai Marina. Budget around AED 120000 yearly and I need it soon.
Hello, this is Sara. I am looking to buy a villa in Arabian Ranches. Budget is AED 3.5 million. Prefer 4 bedrooms.
I am Khalid. Need a studio in JVC for rent, budget 60000. Not urgent.
Hi, my name is Lina. Looking for an investment apartment in Business Bay, preferably 1 bedroom, budget AED 1.2 million.
This is Ahmed. I want to buy a townhouse in Dubai Hills. 3 bed, budget 2.8m, urgent.
